name: COSORI Air Fryer 4.7L
pros: Large 4.7L capacity ideal for families or meal prep
Intuitive touch panel with LED display, easy for English speakers
Highly reliable with 831+ reviews averaging 4.68★ on Rakuten
cons: Recipe booklet is primarily in Japanese; limited English support
Heating elements can accumulate grease; basket requires frequent cleaning
shortDescription: Large-capacity air fryer with touch controls and solid reliability for family cooking.
review: The COSORI air fryer delivers impressive capacity and straightforward operation, making it one of the most practical countertop appliances for expat kitchens in Japan. The touch panel is intuitive and the 4.7L basket handles everything from frozen gyoza to vegetable chips efficiently. However, the included recipe guide is Japanese-focused, so you'll want to rely on online English tutorials.
